query: INSERT INTO podcast_shows (title, slug, description, host_name, host_bio, schedule_day, schedule_time, schedule_timezone, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('SQUADD Podcast', 'squadd-podcast', 'The official voice of the SQUADD Coalition — seven women united in the fight for elder justice, civil rights, economic sovereignty, and community healing.
